title: Where is Mojtaba? Iran's new Supreme Leader skips father Ali Khamenei's funeral
summary_full: During the state funeral prayers for his father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, and four family members, Iran’s new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, chose to remain out of the public eye. Citing security threats following an attack, his absence has sparked considerable speculation. As his brothers and key officials attended, eyes are turned towards Mojtaba's anticipated return amidst reports of personal injuries and ongoing security concerns.
